meta.title: VerifyAI - Deep Reverse Image Search
meta.description: AI-powered photo verification tool, protecting every online interaction

hero.label: Deep Reverse Image Search
hero.description: Reverse trace the source and online history of any photo. VerifyAI searches multiple engines (Google Global Search, Google Lens, Yandex, commercial stock libraries, etc.) to show where the image has appeared and how it is being reused online.

features.label: Use Cases
features.title: "In this era of mixed truth online, helping you spot risks and protect relationships"
features.description: From dating apps to business dealings, VerifyAI has you covered

howItWorks.label: Simple 3-Step Process
howItWorks.title: From Doubt to Confidence in Three Steps
howItWorks.description: A complete verification process for easy photo authenticity assessment

step1.title: Encounter Suspicious Photo
step1.description: Receive a suspicious photo on social media or dating platforms

step2.title: Share to VerifyAI
step2.description: Long-press the photo or upload directly from your album to VerifyAI

step3.title: Get Verification Report
step3.description: Receive a complete analysis and trace the photo's source

reverseSearch.title: Reverse Image Search
reverseSearch.description: Combines multiple search engines for comprehensive coverage, traces photo origins and usage history, checks if social media images are stolen

metadata.title: Metadata Analysis
metadata.description: Check photo modifications and source information

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Why We Do This
mission.intro: The simple reason we launched this app is because scams are rampant worldwide, and among them, the most despicable type exploits human kindness and emotional vulnerabilities — 'romance scams.'

value1.title: Bridging the Digital Divide
value1.description: With simple 'reverse image search,' you can discover that the 'selfie' sent by the other person actually belongs to someone else, preventing the victim from falling into the trap.

value2.title: The Most Awakening Tool for Victims
value2.description: 'Intellectually, they know it's a scam, but emotionally, they can't accept the person doesn't exist until they find the photo's real owner'
value2.citation: —Whitty, M. T., & Buchanan, T. (2016). The online dating romance scam.

value3.title: 100% Confirmation Rate
value3.description: Current AI-generated image detection technology still has uncertainties and cannot achieve complete confirmation, thus lacking the effect of 'awakening' victims. We use pHash image fingerprint technology to achieve 100% verification.

value4.title: The Only Resource in Isolation
value4.description: Most research shows that those falling victim to romance scams first enter a state of isolation (possibly deliberately guided by the scammer), so an app on a phone may be their only discussion partner.

expert.quote: Reverse image search — finding the original source of a photo — is the most evidence-based and persuasive approach.

victim.quote: It wasn't until I saw that the photo of the person I'd been chatting with actually belonged to someone with a completely different name that I finally realized I had been deceived.

team.quote: We simply want to make reverse image search a one-tap action for everyone, because we believe this alone can prevent so many scams.

campaign.label: Protect Together
campaign.title: Share with Those Who Need It
campaign.description: Someone around you may be trapped in doubt. Sharing this app could be the crucial step that helps them see the truth.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Things you may want to know about VerifyAI

items.question: Will my uploaded photos be stored?
items.answer: No. Photos are only temporarily processed during the search and are deleted upon completion. They are never used to train models or shared with third parties.

items.question: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
items.answer: The free version uses 1 search engine; the Pro version simultaneously uses 5 professional engines, better suited for situations where you already feel something is off and want extra confirmation.

items.question: How long does a single search take?
items.answer: The free version takes about 10-20 seconds. The Pro version may take 30-60 seconds as it runs 5 engines, depending on network speed.

items.question: What is VerifyAI's main purpose?
items.answer: We focus on solving the problem of romance scammers who exploit online relationships. These scammers typically use stolen photos as their tools. VerifyAI helps you verify whether the photos from online contacts actually belong to them. If not, that person is highly suspicious and you should confront them directly or discuss with trusted friends and family.

items.question: How does VerifyAI work?
items.answer: If you reverse-search your own selfies or everyday photos online, you typically won't find matching results (unless you're a celebrity). Therefore, if someone's photo can be found extensively online with many "identical" matches, we consider that person highly suspicious. We suggest you exercise caution.

items.question: How does VerifyAI assess risk?
items.answer: We assess risk based on how many identical copies of a photo can be found online. The more copies found, the more famous the person in the photo likely is — and we assume celebrities are unlikely to seek online acquaintances. Photos from commercial stock libraries are the most suspicious, as they were purchased directly.

items.question: What are VerifyAI's limitations regarding fraud detection?
items.answer: 1. We are not a facial recognition app, so we cannot search for different angles or poses of the same person. 2. We cannot identify AI-generated images — current technology cannot guarantee 100% detection of AI-generated faces. We may add this feature when the technology matures. 3. Some regions (such as North Korea, China, etc.) have limited searchable portraits due to regulatory issues. We continue working on solutions.

items.question: Can I upload multiple photos at once?
items.answer: Currently, you can only upload one photo at a time. We will evaluate batch upload functionality in the future.

items.question: What if no results are found?
items.answer: The photo may be new, of poor quality, or outside the search scope. We suggest trying the Pro version or using a different photo.

cta.title: Ready to Trust with Evidence?

footer.brandDescription: Deep reverse image search — AI provides reliable identity verification for your social and business interactions.
